title: Smoor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Smoor''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that was grown by the [[Newcomer]]s on the arid [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
